sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62737" key="leukotra/xhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λευκο-τράχηλος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n62737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">white-necked</tr_>, Anatolius in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(3).188</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
